info.name: ElektraWeb Booking API For Hotels
info.description:
Welecome to ElektraWeb's Booking API documentation.

in order to implement our REST API's in your project successfully please follow the following tips:

  • All the requests require JWT_CODE or Google ReCaptcha's Token decide which one are you planning to use before starting, keep in mind for some cases there will be extra headers required in order to have a working requests.
  • /Login request will only be used if you're planning to use JWT_CODE
  • For Google ReCaptcha you should send it as a header with 'x-captcha' as header name and token as value, you should get the site key from us in order to have a token.

request.description:
Ways to Login:

  • Hotel User:

    • fill body with : ( "hotel-id", "usercode", "password" )

  • ApiKey:

    • fill header with { "AUTHORIZATION": "Bearer APIKEY_TOKEN" }

  • LoginToken:

    • fill body with { "login-token": "Login_Token" }
